summary: Comprehensive end-to-end testing completed for CafeWallet meal plan tracking app. All core features tested and working: user authentication, receipt upload with OpenAI GPT-4o Vision OCR, transaction tracking, analytics with charts, and menu display. Fixed one critical bug (MongoDB ObjectId serialization) that was blocking receipt upload functionality.

critical_bugs.issue: MongoDB ObjectId not JSON serializable - causing 500 error when returning receipt data
critical_bugs.fix_applied: Added doc.pop('_id', None) before returning receipt data in server.py line 291
critical_bugs.impact: Was blocking core receipt upload feature

passed_tests: Backend API: Root endpoint (GET /api/)
Backend API: User signup (POST /api/auth/signup)
Backend API: User login (POST /api/auth/login)
Backend API: Get current user (GET /api/auth/me)
Backend API: Get receipts (GET /api/receipts)
Backend API: Get transactions (GET /api/transactions)
Backend API: Get transaction history (GET /api/transactions/history)
Backend API: Get analytics (GET /api/analytics)
Backend API: Get menu (GET /api/menu)
Backend API: Create menu item (POST /api/menu)
Backend API: Receipt upload validation (422 without file)
Backend API: Receipt upload with OCR (POST /api/receipts/upload with file)
OpenAI GPT-4o Vision OCR: Successfully extracted all items from test receipt
OpenAI GPT-4o Vision OCR: Correctly categorized items (meal, salad, drinks)
OpenAI GPT-4o Vision OCR: Accurate price extraction ($23.75 total)
Transaction creation: 4 transactions created from receipt items
Analytics calculation: Correct total spent ($23.75)
Analytics calculation: Correct spending by category breakdown
Frontend: Auth page loads correctly
Frontend: Signup form works and creates account
Frontend: Login form works with existing credentials
Frontend: Dashboard displays with correct budget information
Frontend: All tabs accessible (Overview, Upload, History, Analytics, Menu)
Frontend: Receipt upload via file input works
Frontend: Transaction history displays all items correctly
Frontend: Analytics charts render correctly (pie chart and bar chart)
Frontend: Budget overview shows correct spent/remaining amounts
Frontend: Budget usage percentage calculated correctly (4.8%)
Frontend: Category icons display correctly in transaction list
Frontend: Logout functionality works
Frontend: Navigation between tabs works smoothly
Integration: Receipt upload → Transaction creation → Analytics update flow works end-to-end

success_percentage.integration: 100% (Full receipt upload → OCR → transactions → analytics flow working)
success_percentage.overall: 100% (All features tested and working after bug fix)

updated_files: /app/backend/server.py (line 291: Added doc.pop('_id', None) to fix ObjectId serialization)
notes: OpenAI GPT-4o Vision OCR is working excellently - accurately extracted all items, prices, and categories from test receipt
All charts (pie chart, bar chart, line chart) rendering correctly with recharts library
Budget calculations are accurate (spent $23.75 out of $500.00 = 4.8% usage)
Transaction history displays with correct category icons and color coding
Menu functionality working but no items displayed (expected - menu scraping not implemented, manual entry only)
JWT authentication working correctly with 30-day token expiration
MongoDB integration working properly with UUID-based IDs (not ObjectId)
EMERGENT_LLM_KEY configured and working with emergentintegrations library
Both file upload and camera capture options available in UI
Responsive design with green color scheme looks professional and clean
